$comment: Intentionally-unwired indicator artifacts. Every entry blocks the catalogue-coverage drift detector from failing. Adding a new artifact to datasets/indicators/in/ MUST be paired with EITHER (a) a topic-catalogue.json entry OR (b) an entry here with a reason. Removing an entry here without wiring it is the ratchet that closes the gap (see TODO/VIZ-LAYER-GAPS-PLAN.md Phase 0). The reason field is plain English; tag with the phase it belongs to so the audit trail is legible.

allowlist.reason: phase4-pending (economy national-series renderer): country-entity single time series; IndicatorChoropleth is state-only. Needs a national-line / KPI tile renderer.
phase4-pending (economy national-series renderer): country-entity faceted by industry; needs stacked-area + facet picker dispatched from chart_type.
phase4-pending (economy national-series renderer): country-entity, quarterly grain; needs stacked-area. formatTimeLabel already handles quarter (Phase 1).
phase4-pending (economy national-series renderer): country-entity, GDP/GNI/NNI/NDP composite; needs multi-series picker.
permanent-allowlist: superseded by state_per_capita_nsdp_current_inr_long (RBI-spliced longer history). Kept on disk as diff-check artifact only — do not wire.
phase4-pending (energy national-series renderer): country-entity, sector-faceted; needs stacked-area.
phase4-pending (energy national-series renderer): country-entity supply mix; needs stacked-area.
phase4-pending (energy national-series renderer): country-entity paired comparison; needs paired-bar component.
